items.title: pandoc_lustre_converter
Action
items.doc:
```
pub opaque type Action(msg)
```
The type that converters should return.
Use the provided constructors `default` and `custom`.

Synonyms:
pandoc_lustre_converter.Action
pandoc_lustre_converter Action

items.title: BlockConverter
items.doc:
```
pub type BlockConverter(msg) =
  fn(doc.Block, List(#(String, String))) -> Action(msg)
```
A block converter is a function that takes a block
and returns and action, where an action is constructed using 
either `default` (converting the element in the default way)
or `custom` (giving a custom lustre element instead).

Example:



Synonyms:
pandoc_lustre_converter.BlockConverter
pandoc_lustre_converter BlockConverter

items.title: InlineConverter
items.doc:
```
pub type InlineConverter(msg) =
  fn(doc.Inline, List(#(String, String))) -> Action(msg)
```
A block converter is a function that takes an inline
and produces and action, where an action is constructed using 
either `default` (converting the element in the default way)
or `custom` (giving a custom lustre element instead).

Synonyms:
pandoc_lustre_converter.InlineConverter
pandoc_lustre_converter InlineConverter

items.title: convert_document
items.doc:
```
pub fn convert_document(
  document: doc.Document,
  block_converter: fn(doc.Block, List(#(String, String))) -> Action(
    msg,
  ),
  inline_converter: fn(doc.Inline, List(#(String, String))) -> Action(
    msg,
  ),
) -> element.Element(msg)
```
